title: Aqua Munda
description: Immersive Craft addon that works around water and cooking
body:
# Aqua Munda

This is an addon mod to [Immersive Craft](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-craft) that adds more immersive ways to work with water (fresh water) and cooking. It adds various low-tech devices to help you purify water, collect water, transport it and so on. It has a sprinkler that needs fresh water and will speed up growth. In addition it also has various cooking devices like a boiler, a cutting board, a grind stone and so on.
